mapper.select: SELECT pd.plan_detail_no, pd.plan_no, pd.place_no, pd.user_no, pd.plan_visit_order, pd.plan_meno, pd.detail_start_date, pd.detail_end_date, p.place_name FROM Plan_Details pd LEFT JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_no = #{planNo} ORDER BY NVL(pd.plan_visit_order, 9999), pd.plan_detail_no
SELECT NVL(p.place_name, 'Unknown Place') FROM Plan_Details pd LEFT JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_no = #{planNo} ORDER BY NVL(pd.plan_visit_order, 9999), pd.plan_detail_no

SELECT DISTINCT tm.tag_name FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place_Tag_Map ptm ON ptm.place_no = pd.place_no INNER JOIN Tag_Master tm ON tm.tag_code = ptm.tag_code WHERE pd.plan_no = #{planNo} ORDER BY tm.tag_name

SELECT DISTINCT tm.tag_category FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place_Tag_Map ptm ON ptm.place_no = pd.place_no INNER JOIN Tag_Master tm ON tm.tag_code = ptm.tag_code WHERE pd.plan_no = #{planNo} ORDER BY tm.tag_category
